text.title: Offline Toolkit Checklist Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply `Offline Toolkit Checklist` end-to-end. Each step has an input, an action, an output, and (where relevant) a decision gate.

step.name: scope-check
step.input: Trigger event + Applies-If / Skip-If from AGENTS.md.
step.action: Confirm every Applies-If holds and no Skip-If trigger fires. Document the result.
step.decision-gate: If NO-GO, STOP and route to a different methodology or escalate.

step.name: gather-inputs
step.action: Collect each prerequisite artefact + assign a named owner per row. Flag missing rows as blockers.
step.output: Prerequisites checklist signed off with owner per row.

step.name: draft-artefact
step.action: Fill the skeleton; do not commit free-form output. Every conclusion carries an evidence link or `not_applicable: <reason>`.
step.decision-gate: If shape-rules in 02-output-contract violated, REJECT and rewrite.

step.name: review-and-evidence
step.action: Run the antipattern checklist against the draft; replace any handwave with evidence anchors.
step.decision-gate: If antipattern detected, repair before next step.

step.name: validate
step.action: Run the validator. Fix all VIOLATION lines.
step.decision-gate: If exit non-zero, return to draft.

step.name: commit-and-publish
step.action: Commit to the team's versioned space; publish a 2-line digest to the named cadence channel.

step.name: outcome-review
step.input: Committed artefact + outcome metrics over the next cycle.
step.action: Measure whether the artefact changed behaviour. Record outcome.
step.output: Outcome-review note appended to the artefact.
step.decision-gate: If outcome shows no change over 2 cycles, propose deprecation.
